description: Document concerning the sale of a female slave named Ḍiyāʾ. Location: Fustat. Dated: Tuesday, 1 Nisan 1537 Seleucid, which is 31 March 1226 CE, under the authority of Avraham Maimonides (r. 1205-1237 CE), who is referenced here with the title "ha-Nagid" which he bore after 1213. CUL Or.1080 J273 (PGPID 4009) is an unsigned copy of the same document. Witnesses include: [...] b. Elʿazar ha-Kohen; Yefet b. Adonim; Shemuel b. Simḥa. Join: Oded Zinger.
description_he: מסמך מכירת שפחה בשם ד'יאא'. פוסטאט, 31 במרץ 1226, בסמכות אברהם מיימוניד.
